scripts.ptau: snarkjs powersoftau new bn128 14 build/pot14_0000.ptau -v && snarkjs powersoftau contribute build/pot14_0000.ptau build/pot14_0001.ptau --name=FirstContribution -e=LocalEntropy123 -v && snarkjs powersoftau prepare phase2 build/pot14_0001.ptau powersOfTau28_hez_final_14.ptau -v
scripts.setup: snarkjs groth16 setup build/medical_proof.r1cs powersOfTau28_hez_final_14.ptau build/medical_proof_0000.zkey
scripts.export:vkey: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/medical_proof_final.zkey build/verification_key.json
scripts.full: npm run ptau && npm run compile && npm run setup && npm run contribute && npm run export:vkey
